description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On June 20, 2025 at 6:34 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Bruno, California was in a collision 
involving a fallen utility line on Cypress Avenue near Clark Avenue.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northbound on Cypress Avenue when the front of the Waymo AV made contact with a fallen utility line 
hanging across the roadway. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV 
sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
